title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. obliquum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. obliquum, also known as the lesser hawkbit or oblique hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antiviral properties, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Hieracium sabaudum subsp. obliquum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health complaints.
